title: Akashic Records of Bastard Magic Instructor
sourceNotes: Source is Taro Hitsuji's light novel (24 vols, ended 2023). Mapped against Aosa Tsunemi's MANGA adaptation (AniList 86432), which finished in June 2021 at 16 volumes / 78 chapters and covers roughly LN vols 1-10. The 2017 TV anime (12 eps, single cour) is a heavily abridged take on LN vols 1-5; the manga adapts that same span across vols 1-10 (ch 1-44), so a viewer resumes reading at ch 45. Episode-to-volume groupings: eps 1-3 = LN1, eps 4-6 = LN2, eps 7-9 = LN3, eps 10-12 = LN4-5. Manga chapter boundaries from MangaDex volume aggregate; LN-to-arc alignment approximate. No theatrical films.
